ValidationRule.description: Insolvency or Insolvency Account cannot be changed once Assignment is created
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ($User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser, Not(ISNEW()), or( AND(ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Account__c), Not(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Account__c)))), AND(ISCHANGED(Insolvency__c), Not(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency__c)))) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot change Insolvency or Insolvency Account once Assignment is created
